reviews.comment:
Nuestro espacio de encuentro con nuestros Huéspedes para buscarlos y venir al @refugiodelmangurrian.
Somos clientes de sus tres espacios principales El Shop la playa de surtidores y el Lavadero de Vehículos. Atención de primera de parte de todos.
* Le falta inversión de cariño a los sanitarios, no por falta de limpieza, sino por falla en el correcto funcionamiento de las instalaciones.

(Translated by Google)
Our meeting place for our guests to pick them up and come to @refugiodelmangurrian.

We are customers of their three main areas: the Shop, the gas station, and the car wash. First-rate service from everyone.

* The restrooms need some attention, not because they're not clean, but because the facilities aren't working properly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeDdETFFBEAE

reviews.comment:
Hola ayer ala noche fui a comer lo q me atiende una chica. Me dio vasos de tergopol, se excuso q no habia bachera. Le pedi de vidrio nunca me lo dio espere mas de 1hora lo q pedi. Me acerq 3 veces a pedirle si aunq sea me podian traer la hamburguesa para mi nene de 2 años q tenia hambre y me termino atendiendo un chico q muy bueno el pibe re atento. Quiero decir algo los pobres como nosotros vamos a pagar no vamos a sacar fiado. , xq digo esto xq vi otro tipo de trato y amabilidad con respecto ala atencion con otro cliente. No voy mas.

(Translated by Google)
Hi, last night I went to eat and a girl served me. She gave me Styrofoam cups, excusing herself by saying there was no sink. I asked for glass cups, but she never gave them to me. I waited over an hour for my order. I went up three times to ask if they could at least bring the hamburger for my two-year-old son, who was hungry, and finally a young man served me. He was very nice and attentive. I want to say something: poor people like us are going to pay, we're not going to buy on credit. I say this because I saw a different kind of treatment and friendliness with another customer. I won't be going back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeXRqX1BnEAE
